app_subtitle: Understand what helps you feel emotionally safe

s1.title: What do you need right now?
s1.description: A quiet space to check in with yourself and identify what you need to feel emotionally safe and connected in your relationship.

select.title: What feels most important right now?

prioritize.title: Which need is primary for you today?

action.title: A small step toward your partner?
action.placeholder: Or write your own action step...

Emotional support.label: Emotional Connection
Emotional support.prompt: What does feeling emotionally connected with your partner look like for you today?
hints: I feel closest to you when we...
I need some dedicated time to...
It would help me feel safe if we could...

Space / time for myself.label: Self-Regulation Space
Space / time for myself.prompt: When conflict rises, what does taking space to regulate your own emotions look like?
hints: Taking a brief pause helps me avoid...
I need a quiet moment to process my...
A healthy, reassuring timeout would sound like...

Clear communication.label: Vulnerable Dialogue
Clear communication.prompt: What would sharing your core feelings (rather than blame or criticism) look like?
hints: Instead of criticizing, I want to say...
I want to share my underlying fear that...
It feels safer for me to express...

Reassurance.label: Reassurance & Safety
Reassurance.prompt: What reassurance do you need to hear from your partner when you feel insecure?
hints: I need to be reminded that we are...
It calms my fears when you tell me...
I want to feel reassured about...

Understanding.label: Emotional Validation
Understanding.prompt: What does having your partner validate your feelings look like during a disagreement?
hints: I want to know you hear my pain, even if you...
It makes me feel seen when you say...
I wish you knew that my reaction comes from...

Stability.label: Relational Safety
Stability.prompt: What helps you feel secure and grounded in your relationship commitment?
hints: Safety to me means knowing that we...
We can build more trust by...
I feel most secure when we...

Honesty.label: Vulnerability & Trust
Honesty.prompt: What truth or vulnerable feeling is hard for you to share with your partner right now?
hints: I've been hesitant to share my feeling of...
I want to be completely honest about my fear of...
Vulnerability in this moment looks like...

Respect.label: Mutual Respect
Respect.prompt: What does respect and care look like during moments of heated disagreement?
hints: Even when we disagree, I need us to...
Respectful listening sounds like...
I feel respected when you...

Clarity about relationship.label: Relational Clarity
Clarity about relationship.prompt: What clarity or alignment about your commitment do you need to talk about?
hints: I need us to align on our shared value of...
What makes me feel uncertain is...
I want to clarify our goals regarding...

default.prompt: What would meeting this need look like in your relationship?
hints: What comes to mind is...
If I share this with my partner...
If I'm honest with myself, I need...
